user.title: Add your first pet
user.description: Pawsistant stores all data locally in Home Assistant — no cloud account required.

data_description.species: Type of animal (e.g. Dog, Cat, Rabbit). Used in sensor names and card labels.

abort.already_configured: Pawsistant is already configured. Use the pawsistant.add_dog service to add more pets.

data.action: What would you like to do?

add_dog.title: Add a pet
add_dog.description: Enter the details for your new pet.

data_description.species: Type of animal (e.g. Dog, Cat, Rabbit). Used in sensor names and card labels.

remove_dog.title: Remove a pet
remove_dog.description: ⚠️ This will permanently delete all events for this pet.

error.name_already_exists: A pet with this name is already registered.
error.dog_not_found: Pet not found. Please refresh and try again.
error.store_unavailable: Integration storage is unavailable. Please reload the integration and try again.
